title: Arabidella filifolia
taxonomy: Arabidella filifolia is classified within the family Brassicaceae. This family is commonly known as the mustard or cabbage family. Arabidella filifolia is an endemic species found in Australia, specifically in the southwestern region. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the genus Arabidella. Arabidella filifolia's classification is further detailed within the order Brassicales.
